Berlin Mitte · Since the neighbourhood loved it

A warm corner of Berlin,
poured into every cup.

Baffels is a cozy living-room café on Gartenstraße — handcrafted waffles, stone-baked bagels and slow specialty coffee, served the way friends serve friends.

Our Story

A living room with a coffee machine — and the door wide open.

We started Baffels with a simple thought: Berlin deserved a café that felt like coming home. Soft light. Worn wood. Conversations that drift past closing time. Every waffle is pressed to order, every bagel baked locally, every coffee pulled by people who actually love it.

€1–10
Honest prices

Fresh bake
LGBTQ+
Friendly to all
The Menu

Slow food.
Honest prices.

Everything is prepared in-house, pressed fresh and plated on warm wooden boards. Vegetarian and vegan options on every page.

Laid out on the table

The everyday spread.

A flat-lay of what's on our boards this week — shot in our own light, no filters.

Atmosphere

"It smells like cinnamon, sounds like vinyl,
and feels like someone saved you a seat."

Warm lamps, second-hand chairs, a bookshelf no one curates. Stay an hour, stay an afternoon — the wifi is fast and nobody is counting your refills.

Loved by the neighbourhood

★ 4.8 · 392 reviews

Real words from real guests — Google, TripAdvisor and the people who walk in twice a week.
